mapper.select: SELECT eno,ename,sex,rank,dname,phone,TO_CHAR(regdate,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS regdate,status FROM emp e JOIN emprank r ON e.rankno=r.rankno JOIN empstatus es ON e.statuscode=es.statuscode JOIN dept d ON e.deptno=d.deptno ORDER BY eno OFFSET #{start} ROWS FETCH NEXT 20 ROWS ONLY

SELECT eno,ename,sex,phone,email,TO_CHAR(birth_date,'yyyy-mm-dd') AS birth_date,TO_CHAR(regdate,'yyyy-mm-dd') AS regdate,addr1,addr2,rank,dname,status,isadmin,id,pwd FROM emp e JOIN emprank r ON e.rankno=r.rankno JOIN dept d ON e.deptno=d.deptno JOIN empstatus s ON e.statuscode=s.statuscode WHERE id=#{id}
